title: Youmind 12947 Smash Burger
prompt: Technical architectural blueprint of a Classic Smash Burger on deep navy drafting paper. Hyperrealistic food hero centered-left, dramatically lit from upper left, warm studio spotlight, cross-section view revealing every layer in precise stack order, lacy-edged patties visible in full photorealistic color, cheese mid-cascade, bun toasted golden, sauce pooling at base catching warm light. Blueprint linework in electric blue, precise measurement lines, stack height callouts, patty thickness cross-section, bun diameter diagram, sauce trajectory arc, grid overlay. Labels connected by thin glowing CAD elbow-joint lines, no crossovers: "{argument name="label 1" default="BRIOCHE BUN sesame-crowned, butter-toasted, 11cm diameter"}" "{argument name="label 2" default="SMASH PATTY ×2  80/20 chuck, 85g each, crust-temp 220°C"}"  "{argument name="label 3" default="AMERICAN CHEESE  single-fold melt, 2 slices, full cascade}"  "CARAMELIZED ONION  45min low-heat, moisture-reduced, dark"  "BREAD & BUTTER PICKLE  4mm slice, brine-bright, translucent"  "HOUSE SAUCE  thousand island base, 18g applied, amber". Labels clustered right and top, white Helvetica Neue Light uppercase, thin italic descriptors below. Compass rose bottom-left, scale bar bottom-center, revision block top-right. Title block double-border bottom-right: "DISH: THE SMASH // CLASSIFICATION: AMERICAN CLASSIC // BUILD SPEC: Engineered to be the last burger you ever need." 4K, tack sharp, electric blue linework glowing softly, warm golden burger tones popping against cool navy. Craveable.
